name: Kelly Cole
bio: Kelly Cole serves as the Wood County Sheriff, leading law enforcement operations from the county seat of Quitman. Sheriff Cole oversees patrol, investigations, and detention services protecting Wood County's communities and popular Lake Fork fishing destination.
campaignPromises: Enhance lake patrol on Lake Fork and Lake Quitman
Protect seasonal visitors and tourism-based businesses
Maintain aggressive drug enforcement on county highways
Keep the Wood County Jail safe, secure, and within budget
Expand use of technology for crime prevention and solving
